notes: Game plays fine with no tweaks needed, performance the same as running under VFIO (windows VM with a dedicated GPU); player character is only a floating head (and power tool); ingame workshop browsing never loads, but using workshop from Steam client works fine.
title: Trailmakers

notes: Works great if you disable esync / use Wine D3d11 (you gotta put "PROTON_NO_ESYNC=1 PROTON_USE_WINED3D11=1 %command%" into the launch options)
title: Trailmakers
